articles.title: Man dies after kayak overturns off Cape Cod
articles.description:
A man was found floating in Cape Cod waters after his kayak tipped over, local officials said.

The post Man dies after kayak overturns off Cape Cod appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A man drowned after his kayak overturned off Cape Cod on March 15.
Local officials recovered the body, highlighting safety concerns for kayakers.
Residents are urged to prioritize safety measures while kayaking in local waters.

articles.title: Huber’s overtime goal gives the Fleet a 4-3 win over the Victoire
articles.description:
With the overtime win, Boston (9-5-2-3) remained in first place in the PWHL three points ahead of Montreal (9-4-1-5).

The post Huber’s overtime goal gives the Fleet a 4-3 win over the Victoire appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Huber scored the overtime goal, securing a 4-3 victory for the Fleet.
Boston Fleet improved to 9-5-2-3, maintaining first place in the PWHL.
The win puts Boston three points ahead of Montreal, boosting local team morale.
